scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @openadminos/agent-sdk && npm run typecheck -w @openadminos/connector-teams && npm run typecheck -w @openadminos/runtime && npm run typecheck -w @openadminos/qa-graph && npm run typecheck -w @openadminos/desktop
